dialogos.texto_en: Hmm, what should we do?
There are so many options, it's tough to decide.
Oh, what's wrong with you two?\nLooks like you're having trouble.\nDid something happen?
Ah, Uesugi-san.
Big bro, perfect timing!
We were talking about where to go.\nHow about you join us?
Oh, sure, I don't mind.\nShall we go around together?
O-okay!
But, we can't quite decide on a destination,\nso we're having a tough time.
I heard the Dream Center over there\nhas lots of rare flowers to see.
That's a botanical garden with tropical plants, right!\nSounds good, doesn't it?
The Oceanic Culture Museum has a planetarium,\nwhere you can see the Okinawan starry sky.
That sounds good too.\nIt's quite romantic, don't you think?
I don't mind that either.\nOkinawa's starry sky\nis totally different from our hometown's.
Mmhh...
What's wrong, Raiha? Did something happen?
Also, it might be nice to see the beautiful view\nat the nearby Emerald Beach.
That's a good idea too.\nThat beach is known for its beauty, right?
Oh, Emerald Beach...
Oh, come on!\nI've been the only one suggesting places the whole time,\nyou know?
Huh? Well,\nwherever you want to go takes top priority\nover what we say...
Don't worry about me!\nPlease decide on a place just between you two!
Oh dear.\nWhat do you think, Yotsuba?
Umm...
If it's alright, how about we go to Emerald Beach?
Haven't gotten enough beaches yet, eh?\nWe went swimming there yesterday.
That's true. But I heard this particular beach\nis exceptionally beautiful,\nand I'd like to go if possible.
I gotcha.\nSince we're here, let's check it out then.
Okay, thanks!
Raiha, you cool with that?
Yes, I'm fine with it.\nBut...
What, what's wrong?
I said to make a decision just between the two of you.
Yeah, but you're also going with us,\nso we should make sure with you as well...
Hmm, well, I appreciate your consideration, big bro.
I-it's okay, Raiha-chan.\nThat's just...
The good thing about Uesugi-san.
Okay, if Yotsuba-san says so, then I'll allow it!
Got it, let's go.
Huh? Really?
Big bro actually made a big decision?!
What's the matter?\nIs it so strange?
Judging from Yotsuba's behavior,\nit was clear that she wanted to go to Emerald Beach.
You don't have do be so shy...
Ahaha... Excuse me.
Nice, nice.\nGreat job, big bro!
Uwaaa! It's so beautiful!
The sea is a stunning emerald green!\nJust as its name says.
It's not just any emerald green.\nThe depth of the color increases\nas you go further out to sea.
However, I didn't expect to find such a beach\nright next to the park.
And, it looks like no one else is here except for us.
Amazing! It's like a private beach!
Raiha! Don't run and fall!
Yeah!
(This is a pleasant surprise.\n It's probably just a coincidence,\n but it's like it was prepared just for us.)
Hey, Yotsuba-san!\nThere's a shisa here too!
Oh wow, you're right!\nIt must be protecting the peace of this beach!
Hey, hey, let's take a photo as a memento!
Of course! Leave it to me!
I'm going to follow Raiha.\nI'll be back in a flash!
Oh, sure. Take your time.
Umm, this is the resting beach,\nthat side is the viewing beach,\nand over there is the playing beach.
Where should we go first?
Before that,\nlet's take a photo with the sea as the background!
Yaaay!
(Haha, what kind of photos are the two of them taking?)
Oh! Look at this!\nThis driftwood looks really cool.
Yeah, it looks like a boat.\nYotsuba-san, let's ride it together!
Before that, I'm gonna take photo!\nOkay, strike a pose!
(A photo, eh.\n I wonder how many we've taken on this trip.)
This seashell is really pretty.\nI wonder if this one over here is a fragment of coral?
There's a lighthouse beyond that cape.\nI'll show it to everyone later.
Ahaha. That cloud looks like a shark, doesn't it?
(Haha, that Yotsuba takes photos of everything,\n doesn't she?)
But, the sea is really beautiful...
I'm glad I came here.
Ah...
Uesugi-san, is everything okay?
I-it's nothing!
Yotsuba! A sea urchin!\nLook, there's a spiky sea urchin!
A sea urchin? We DEFINITELY have to look at that!
(I took a photo without thinking.\n What am I doing...)
(I took...a really good photo.)
